title: Misconception
description: First-class Misconception entity with content-hash ID (REC-LNK-02). Replaces the earlier unstable chunk-position-based misconception_id format.

id.description: Content-hash misconception ID: sha256(misconception_text + '|' + correction_text)[:16]. Stable across runs when text is unchanged.

concept_id.description: Optional typed link to the concept this misconception targets. Populated when upstream emit provides it (future wave may wire from JSON-LD).

lo_id.description: Optional typed link to the LO this misconception threatens.
